name: I'm on back of 'Ole Paint
hints: You're on the horse! Silver Spurs treasure is here.
GET SPUR for the Silver Spurs treasure. SAY GIDD to make the horse go.
SAY GIDD makes the horse ride to a hidden canyon. SPUR bucks you off into the manure.
GET SPUR. SAY GIDD for a long ride to the hidden canyon (room 36). D=dismount to stall (19).

effects: Message: may need to say a magic word here
Message: may need to say a magic word here

notes: On 'Ole Paint. Silver Spurs treasure here. SAY GIDD rides to hidden canyon (36). SPUR bucks you into manure (30). D=stall (19).
